{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Ben
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Ben]] is the name [[Teranon]] uses to address [[Benri]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“You shouldn’t have called me, Ben,” Teranon sighed.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
